title: application.stage.changed payload (v1)
description: Emitted on EVERY application stage transition — the PATCH stage-update route, the hire route, the reject route, and BOTH candidate-service NATS subscriber advances (assessment.completed -> ASSESSMENT, interview.round.started -> canonical round stage). Producer: candidate-service (apps/candidate-service/src/lib/decision-events.ts publishStageChanged). The payload shape is owned by candidate-service (StageChangedPayload), NOT packages/contracts. Ids are plain strings (Application.id is a cuid). Subject leaf is `stage.changed` (domain=application). No subscriber consumes this subject today — it is an audit-trail event.
x-producer: candidate-service (stage-update route, hire route, reject route, assessment + interview subscriber advances)

changedByUserId.description: User who drove the change, or null for subscriber-driven advances.

source.description: Which write path drove the change: `api` (route), `assessment` (assessment.completed advance), `interview` (interview.round.started advance).
